roles.name: Babalawo of Ifa
roles.description: Father of Secrets — diviner who reads the Odu and architects the destiny of the whole solution.

roles.name: Oba of the Project
roles.description: King of the delivery court — holds the calendar, the treasury, and the word given to the Orisha.

roles.name: Keeper of the Sacred Calabash
roles.description: Guardian of the holy vessels — fields, layouts, profiles and permission sets are kept clean within.

roles.name: Ogun's Forge-Smith
roles.description: Worker of iron in Ogun's smithy — forges Apex, LWC and platform craft with hammer and fire.

roles.name: Olori Awo of Oyo
roles.description: Chief of the priesthood in the great northern city — sets standards across all Salesforce craft.

roles.name: Senior Awo of Ile-Ife
roles.description: Senior diviner at the cradle of the world — leads delivery on the most sacred engagements.

roles.name: Junior Awo of the Grove
roles.description: Diviner-in-training under the elders — learns the Odu of configuration and discovery.

roles.name: Bridge-Master of Eshu
roles.description: Architect of the crossroads — designs the spans where messages pass between worlds.

roles.name: Senior Crossroads Builder
roles.description: Lays the stones of API, middleware, and event flows along Eshu's roads.

roles.name: Apprentice of the Crossroads
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration at the crossroads — webhooks, batch and the patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Healer of Osanyin's Grove
roles.description: Herbalist of the leafy realm — finds the maladies in the build before they reach the Oba.

roles.name: Griot of the Pantheon
roles.description: Chief storyteller — keeps the praise-songs of brand and product alive across all the markets.

roles.name: Drummer of the Bata
roles.description: Senior drummer of Shango's bata — strategist of campaigns that summon and convert.

roles.name: Praise-Singer of Oshun
roles.description: Singer of the river-goddess's beauty — content, creative, and the daily call to the marketplace.

roles.name: Scribe of the Odu
roles.description: Records the verses of the Odu Ifa — translates client need into the language of design.

roles.name: Master Forger of Ogun
roles.description: Eldest of the smithy — forges the deepest, most senior Apex and platform work in iron and fire.

roles.name: Acolyte of the Grove
roles.description: First-year initiate carrying the elders' tools and learning the simplest verses of the Odu.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every sphere starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries, future weeks get Schedules. The four spheres represent distinct currents within the Orisha pantheon.

realms.subAccountName: House of the Supreme Creator Orishas
College of the Ifa Priesthood and Mortal Heroes

supreme-creator-orishas.name: Olodumare's Decree
supreme-creator-orishas.description: Discovery sign-off — the Supreme One pronounces the project's purpose.

supreme-creator-orishas.name: Obatala Shapes the Clay
supreme-creator-orishas.description: Build kickoff: the first humans of the data model are moulded from white clay.

supreme-creator-orishas.name: Eshu Opens the Crossroads
supreme-creator-orishas.description: Mid-project gate: integrations sanctioned at the trickster's crossing.

supreme-creator-orishas.name: Olokun's Tribute
supreme-creator-orishas.description: Phase invoice: tribute to the deep-ocean lord for archive migration.

supreme-creator-orishas.name: Breath of Life Released
supreme-creator-orishas.description: Go-Live: Olorun breathes life into the production environment.

supreme-creator-orishas.name: Calabash Sealed
supreme-creator-orishas.description: Hyper-care close: the sacred calabash sealed, custody passed to the priesthood.

warrior-orishas.name: Shango's Drums Sound
warrior-orishas.description: Project kickoff: the bata drums call the warriors to muster.

warrior-orishas.name: Ogun Forges the Tools
warrior-orishas.description: Build phase: iron tools struck on Ogun's anvil.

warrior-orishas.name: Oshosi's Hunt Succeeds
warrior-orishas.description: UAT gate: the hunter brings home the quarry — defects flushed.

warrior-orishas.name: Lightning Strikes True
warrior-orishas.description: Go-Live: Shango's lightning bolt finds its mark in production.

warrior-orishas.name: Omolu Heals the Camp
warrior-orishas.description: Hyper-care close: the healer tends every warrior before they march home.

warrior-orishas.name: Spoils of War Distributed
warrior-orishas.description: Final invoice: the brotherhood divides the tribute.

feminine-orishas.name: Oshun's River Rises
feminine-orishas.description: Discovery: the goddess of beauty blesses the engagement at the river bend.

feminine-orishas.name: Yemoja Births the Forms
feminine-orishas.description: Build: the mother of waters gives birth to the data structures.

feminine-orishas.name: Oya's Storm Tested
feminine-orishas.description: Build: the whirlwind goddess stress-tests the platform — wind and lightning.

feminine-orishas.name: Iyaami Council Accepts
feminine-orishas.description: UAT acceptance: the great mothers approve the build in solemn council.

feminine-orishas.name: Marketwomen Take the Stalls
feminine-orishas.description: Go-Live: the iyalode open their stalls in the new marketplace.

feminine-orishas.name: Tribute to the Sisterhood
feminine-orishas.description: Final invoice: brass, honey and cowries to the river-goddesses.

ifa-priesthood-and-mortal-heroes.name: Opele Cast at Ile-Ife
ifa-priesthood-and-mortal-heroes.description: Kickoff divination: Orunmila casts the chain, the Odu is named.

ifa-priesthood-and-mortal-heroes.name: Oduduwa Lays the Cornerstone
ifa-priesthood-and-mortal-heroes.description: Discovery complete: the founder marks the four corners of the city.

ifa-priesthood-and-mortal-heroes.name: Moremi Returns from Sacrifice
ifa-priesthood-and-mortal-heroes.description: Build: the heroine returns from the Igbo with the secret of victory — the design baked in.

ifa-priesthood-and-mortal-heroes.name: Babalawo Initiation
ifa-priesthood-and-mortal-heroes.description: UAT acceptance: new initiates pronounce the Odu correctly — sign-off granted.

ifa-priesthood-and-mortal-heroes.name: Coronation at Enuwa Square
ifa-priesthood-and-mortal-heroes.description: Go-Live: the new Ooni is crowned, the system enthroned in production.

ifa-priesthood-and-mortal-heroes.name: Tribute to the College
ifa-priesthood-and-mortal-heroes.description: Final invoice: kola nuts, palm wine and gold to the Ifa college.

Olodumare.notes: Withdrawn to the upper sky — the Supreme One rarely intervenes directly.

Obatala.notes: White-cloth cleansing rites — must abstain from palm wine for the duration.

Eshu Elegba.notes: Travelling between the crossroads — unreachable by Slack.

Olokun.notes: Returning to the deep ocean for the seasonal census of the drowned.

Shango.notes: Royal court at Oyo — the king cannot be summoned for tickets.

Ogun.notes: Annual cleansing of the smithy — no iron struck for three days.

Oshosi.notes: Long hunt in the Igbo forest — out of signal.

Omolu Babaluaye.notes: Tending a smallpox outbreak in a neighbouring village.

Oshun.notes: Annual Osun-Osogbo festival — the river-goddess will not be moved.

Yemoja.notes: Birthing rites at the river-mouth — closed to outsiders.

Oya.notes: Whirlwind passing through Niger — best to stay indoors.

Yewa.notes: Vow of chastity-week observance — silent retreat.

Orunmila.notes: Casting the Odu for the new year — undisturbed by request.

Moremi Ajasoro.notes: Pilgrimage to the Esimirin stream — annual remembrance of her sacrifice.

Oduduwa.notes: Founder's commemoration at Enuwa Square — court business suspended.
